prompt:
Unique, collectible NFT character in bold cartoon style. 
Background: Shuttered warehouse with broken windows and light shafts. 
Head: Basic round head with random sticker placement. 
Eyes: Cross-stitch pattern where eyes should be. 
Clothing: Double-layered hoodie with inner contrast color. 
Color: Matte black tone with light diffusion. 
Species: Flamehead. 
Only visible text: 'VERT'. 
Bold outlines, cel-shading, flat colors, no gradients, no photorealism.
negative_prompt: helmet, orb, robot, photorealism, human, realistic, plain background, text: MFKZ, text: NFT, text: cartoon, text: character, text except 'VERT', logos, brand names, cityscape, cars, crowds, generic urban, street scene, people, motorcycles, goggles, robot eyes, robot face, 3D, gradients, smooth shading, realistic textures, hats, hoods, gloves, shoes, boots, sandals, socks, dull eyes, blank head, blank eyes, studio lighting, plain wall, photostudio, blank setting, plain t-shirt, generic shirt, studio portrait
